preservedBehaviors.description: Dropdown component renders a custom dropdown with button, menu, and search
TextInput component renders an input with Poppins font
TextArea component renders a textarea with Poppins font
CheckboxInput renders a checkbox input with orange accent
RadioInput renders a radio input with orange accent
FileInput component renders a file input with preview
FileInput buttons include hover:border-orange-300 for interactive hover style
Dropdown button does not have redundant styling
